metadata.description: SDLC Harness — a multi-agent system that orchestrates your entire software development lifecycle with 19 specialized agents and 16 domain skills.

plugins.name: sdlc-harness
plugins.description: Full SDLC orchestration with 19 agents (harness, analyst, scaffolder, implementer, deployer, documenter, QA coordinator, 8 QA reviewers, RAI reviewer, release manager) and 16 skills covering code quality, security, architecture, testing, scaffolding, and Azure cloud patterns.
